Animated Layer Preview

This assembles every boss sprite from basicObjs position, image offset, scale, angle, and layer order. Rotating parts use their source rotationSpeed. 8 of 8 sprite parts rendered / 3 dead-state variants included.

Boss Sprite Parts

These are the visual parts from basicObjs. Multi-part bosses are built by layering these sprites in-game.
